name: 3' Faux Fur Round Kids' Rug White - Pillowfort™
description: Create a favorite spot to sit in a childs room with the Faux Fur Rug (3' Round) White from Pillowfort. This round furry rug would also look elegant in a wardrobe in front of a full-length mirror. If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
